/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 18 M/PF145 18/VF2 150/FOP1 3 MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/COMUN:25/X:1 MADD VICTIM IMPACT CLASS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST MAKE ARRANGEMENTS FOR PAYMENT OF ALL FINES ANDFEES NOT LATER THAN 11-30-20 BY CONTACTING THE COLLECTIONS DEPARTMENT LOCATED IN ROOM 101, HALL OF JUSTICE, 850 BRYANT ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/CCU/X:COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE INDICATES THERE IS NO RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER,/4019HALF/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/X:THE COURT ACCEPTS THE DEFENDANT'S PLEA IN ABSENTIA PAPERWORK, THE MILLS WAIVER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #3, VC 23103 WITHIN THEMEANING OF VC 23103,5, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 19/JAVS/TRANS 19 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/DAWT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSERESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2 HOUR/
